Spanish La Liga 2025-10-26 Real Madrid vs Barcelona
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Real Madrid and Barcelona met at the Santiago Bernabéu on Sunday, 26 October 2025, for the first El Clásico of the 2025–26 La Liga season. Real Madrid entered the match top of the table and looking to extend their lead, while Barcelona were chasing to stay close in the title race. Madrid’s attack, led by Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham, had been firing, and coach Carlo Ancelotti emphasized control and quick transitions. Barcelona, under Hansi Flick, relied on their youthful core, with Pedri, Fermín López and Gavi central to their buildup. Injuries limited Madrid’s defensive depth, but both sides arrived confident. The match promised intensity, tactical contrast, and the usual Clásico drama.
soccer.strResult:
Kylian Mbappé gave Madrid the lead in the 22nd minute with a precise finish after a fast break. Barcelona equalized through Fermín López around the 36th minute, finishing off a neat passing move. Just before half-time, Jude Bellingham restored Madrid’s advantage with a composed strike inside the box. In the second half, Barcelona had more possession but struggled to break through Madrid’s compact shape. Madrid missed a penalty early in the half, saved by Szczęsny, yet held firm defensively. Pedri was sent off for a second yellow card in stoppage time, ending Barcelona’s hopes of a late equalizer.

Real Madrid’s efficiency and control earned them the win, extending their lead at the top of La Liga to five points. Barcelona’s defeat highlighted their attacking inconsistency, while Madrid reinforced their status as early title favorites.

Spanish La Liga 2026-02-20 Athletic Bilbao vs Elche
soccer.strDescriptionEN: The historic San Mamés stadium plays host to a pivotal Matchday 25 encounter as Athletic Bilbao welcomes a struggling Elche CF. The Basque hosts enter the fixture on a high note, seeking to string together three consecutive league victories for the first time this season. With a push for European qualification within reach, Athletic will look to exploit their home-field advantage and the clinical form of Gorka Guruzeta. Conversely, Elche arrives in Bilbao desperate for points to pull themselves away from the relegation zone. Having failed to win in their last seven outings, the visitors face a daunting task against one of the league's most disciplined defenses in what promises to be a high-intensity "Friday Night Lights" clash.
soccer.strResult:
Gorka Guruzeta continued his remarkable scoring run, netting twice to lead Athletic Bilbao to a hard-fought 2-1 victory over Elche. In an action-packed second half, Guruzeta broke the deadlock in the 64th minute, showing great predatory instinct to convert a low, driven cross from Yuri Berchiche. However, the lead was short-lived as Elche was awarded a penalty just five minutes later. André Silva stepped up and, despite being forced to retake his spot-kick due to a double-touch violation on the first attempt, kept his cool to level the score and silence the Bilbao faithful.

The match appeared destined for a draw until a controversial moment in the 89th minute when the referee pointed to the spot for an Athletic penalty following a challenge on substitute Eder García. Guruzeta stepped up under immense pressure and buried the winner, securing Athletic's third straight league win. While Elche fought valiantly and dominated possession for large spells of the second half, their winless streak now extends to eight matches, leaving them precariously close to the bottom three.

soccer.strFilename: Spanish La Liga 2026-02-21 Atlético Madrid vs Espanyol
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Atlético Madrid enters Matchday 25 of La Liga under pressure to revitalize their domestic campaign at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano. Diego Simeone's side has navigated a turbulent period, managing only a single point from their last three league outings, including a heavy defeat to Rayo Vallecano. While their midweek Champions League draw against Club Brugge showed flashes of offensive potential, defensive lapses remain a concern for the "Colchoneros." Standing in their way is an Espanyol side that has proven difficult for Atlético to overcome in recent years, including a victory in the reverse fixture earlier this season. With Alexander Sørloth and Antoine Griezmann leading the line, the hosts will prioritize an early breakthrough to settle nerves and keep pace in the race for the top four.
soccer.strResult:
Alexander Sørloth delivered a clinical performance to lead Atlético Madrid to a 4-2 victory over Espanyol, snapping their winless streak in emphatic fashion. Despite falling behind in just the sixth minute to a Jofre Carreras goal following a defensive error, the hosts remained composed. Sørloth ignited the comeback in the 21st minute by heading home a precise cross from Marcos Llorente. After a competitive first half that ended level, Atlético shifted gears after the break, with Giuliano Simeone putting his father's side ahead just four minutes into the second half following a clever assist from Alejandro Baena.

The momentum stayed firmly with the "Rojiblancos" as the second half progressed. Ademola Lookman extended the lead in the 58th minute, diving in at the far post to convert a flicked-on corner from Matteo Ruggeri. Sørloth then effectively ended the contest in the 72nd minute, powering home his second of the night and 12th of the campaign after another Ruggeri delivery. While Edu Expósito added a late consolation goal for Espanyol with a sharp strike from the edge of the area, the night belonged to Atlético, whose dominant 20-shot performance restored confidence ahead of their critical Champions League return leg.

soccer.strFilename: Spanish La Liga 2026-02-21 Real Betis vs Rayo Vallecano
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Real Betis welcomes Rayo Vallecano to the Estadio de La Cartuja for a Matchday 25 encounter, with the "Béticos" forced to play away from their usual Benito Villamarín home due to ongoing stadium renovations. Manuel Pellegrini’s side enters the fixture sitting 5th in the table, fueled by the sensational form of Antony, whose midweek Europa League heroics secured their passage to the Round of 16. Rayo Vallecano arrives in Seville as a dangerous underdog, fresh off a stunning upset victory against Atlético Madrid last weekend. While Betis aims to solidify their Champions League aspirations, Rayo’s high-pressing style led by Isi Palazón promises to make this a grueling tactical battle in the Andalusian sun.
soccer.strResult:
Real Betis and Rayo Vallecano played out a hard-fought 1-1 draw at La Cartuja, a result that left both sides with mixed emotions. The hosts got off to a perfect start when Cédric Bakambu found the back of the net in the 16th minute, capitalizing on a slick attacking move to put Betis ahead. However, Rayo Vallecano showed the same resilience that stunned Atlético Madrid a week prior, clawing their way back into the game just before the break. Isi Palazón proved to be the thorn in the side of the Betis defense, striking in the 42nd minute to level the scores after an assist from Andrei Ratiu.

The second half was a story of Betis pressure met by organized Rayo resistance. Manuel Pellegrini turned to his bench late in the game, introducing Cucho Hernández to replace Bakambu, but the winning goal remained elusive. Abde Ezzalzouli came closest in stoppage time with a powerful header, but a superb reaction save from Rayo's Augusto Batalla ensured the spoils were shared. While Betis will be frustrated at dropping points at home, the draw keeps them firmly in the hunt for European spots, while Rayo continues their impressive run against the league's top-tier clubs.

soccer.strFilename: Spanish La Liga 2026-02-21 Osasuna vs Real Madrid
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Real Madrid travels to El Sadar for a pivotal Matchday 25 encounter, facing an Osasuna side that has transformed its home stadium into a genuine fortress. While the "Merengues" enter as league leaders, Álvaro Arbeloa's squad is wary of the physical challenge posed by the Navarrese hosts, especially with key defensive figures like Jude Bellingham and Éder Militão sidelined due to injury. Osasuna, led by the clinical Ante Budimir, sits comfortably in the mid-table and will look to exploit any signs of fatigue from Real Madrid's demanding European schedule. For the visitors, the focus is on maintaining their slender lead over Barcelona, knowing that any slip-up in the intense atmosphere of Pamplona could reopen the title race.
soccer.strResult:
Osasuna produced a historic performance at El Sadar, defeating Real Madrid 2-1 to record their first victory over the "Blancos" since 2011. The match turned on a controversial 38th-minute incident when Thibaut Courtois was judged to have fouled Ante Budimir after a VAR review overturned an initial booking for simulation. Budimir made no mistake from the penalty spot, powering the ball into the bottom corner to give the hosts a deserved lead at the break. Real Madrid struggled to break through a resilient Osasuna defense for much of the game, with Sergio Herrera producing several vital saves to deny Kylian Mbappé.

The second half saw a frantic response from the league leaders. After Arda Güler struck the post and Mbappé had a goal ruled out for offside, Vinícius Júnior finally found the equalizer in the 73rd minute, tapping home after a brilliant individual run and cross from Federico Valverde. Just as Real Madrid seemed poised to find a winner, Osasuna struck on the counter-attack in the 90th minute. Raúl García de Haro skillfully outmaneuvered defender Raúl Asencio before curling a precise finish past Courtois, sending the home crowd into raptures and handing Real Madrid their first league defeat in months.

soccer.strFilename: Spanish La Liga 2026-02-21 Real Sociedad vs Real Oviedo
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Real Sociedad returns to the Reale Arena looking to bounce back from a heavy defeat to Real Madrid and solidify their position in the top half of the table. Currently sitting 9th in La Liga, the "Txuri-urdin" face a struggling Real Oviedo side that is rooted to the bottom of the standings. Despite the gap in the table, the hosts are wary of an Oviedo team desperate for survival points.
soccer.strResult:
In one of the most unpredictable matches of the season, Real Sociedad and Real Oviedo played out a pulsating 3-3 draw at the Reale Arena. After a scoreless first half, the game exploded into life as Real Oviedo took a shock two-goal lead early in the second period thanks to a quickfire brace from Federico Viñas. The uruguayan striker headed home twice in the span of two minutes, leaving the home fans in stunned silence. Real Sociedad responded with character as substitute Orri Óskarsson pulled one back in the 64th minute before Duje Caleta-Car hammered home an equalizer from a corner with just three minutes of regulation time remaining.

The drama reached its peak in stoppage time when Óskarsson scored his second of the night in the 90th minute, completing what seemed to be a miraculous comeback for the hosts. However, Real Oviedo refused to leave San Sebastian empty-handed. In the 92nd minute, the legendary Santi Cazorla delivered a trademark pinpoint cross for Eric Bailly, who rose highest to head home a dramatic last-gasp equalizer. While the point does little to move Oviedo off the bottom of the table, the manner of the performance provides a massive boost to their survival hopes, while Real Sociedad will be frustrated at dropping two points after nearly clinching the win.

soccer.strFilename: Spanish La Liga 2026-02-22 Barcelona vs Levante
soccer.strDescriptionEN: Barcelona welcomes a struggling Levante side to the Spotify Camp Nou for a crucial La Liga fixture. Hansi Flick's men are looking to bounce back from a disappointing stretch that included a heavy Copa del Rey exit and a recent 2-1 defeat to Girona. Despite these setbacks, the Blaugrana remain firmly in the title hunt, sitting just behind Real Madrid in the standings. Lamine Yamal and Raphinha continue to lead the attacking charge, while the club waits on the full return of Gavi and Pedri from injury. Levante, currently languishing in the relegation zone, faces a daunting task; they have lost their last three matches and historically struggle at the Camp Nou, where Barcelona has won their last 17 meetings. For the visitors, securing even a single point would be a monumental step in their fight for survival.
soccer.strResult:
FC Barcelona delivered a professional and dominant performance to secure a 3-0 victory over Levante UD, keeping the pressure on at the top of the La Liga table. The match was one-sided from the opening whistle as Barcelona controlled nearly 70% of possession and limited the visitors to just a handful of sights on goal. The breakthrough came via Ferran Torres, who continued his fine form by finding the back of the net to give the hosts a comfortable cushion. Lamine Yamal was once again the architect of much of Barcelona's creativity, providing the spark that Levante's defense simply could not contain.

Levante’s afternoon went from bad to worse as they struggled to deal with Barcelona's high press and wing play. While they attempted to remain compact, the sheer volume of chances created—led by Raphinha’s relentless energy—eventually wore them down. The victory sees Barcelona move to 61 points, successfully navigating a "trap" game following their recent struggles. For Levante, this fourth consecutive defeat leaves them deeper in the relegation mire, desperately needing a change in fortunes as the season enters its final third.

NBA 2026-02-22 New Orleans Pelicans vs Philadelphia 76ers
basket.strDescriptionEN: The New Orleans Pelicans return home to host the Philadelphia 76ers in an inter-conference matchup that finds both teams searching for consistency. The 76ers enter the contest looking to navigate a difficult stretch without their centerpiece, as Joel Embiid remains sidelined due to injury management. Philadelphia relies heavily on the backcourt brilliance of Tyrese Maxey to carry the scoring load, while the Pelicans lean on the interior dominance of Zion Williamson. With New Orleans fighting to climb out of the bottom of the Western Conference standings and Philadelphia battling for playoff positioning in the East, this game serves as a critical opportunity for either side to gain much-needed momentum.

news-soccer.title: Almeyda: 'Si cada cohete vale 50 millones, ¿por qué no se llevan a África en arroz y educación?'
news-soccer.author: JOSÉ GORDILLO
news-soccer.description: El argentino reflexionó sobre el espejo social del fútbol y la pérdida de cercanía entre las personas.

news-soccer.title: El Tottenham suma más bajas: 'Cuti' Romero y Palhinha, fuera ante el Liverpool
news-soccer.author: CÉSAR DÍAZ
news-soccer.description: No estarán disponibles tras un choque de cabezas en el partido de Champions contra el Atleti.

news-soccer.title: Guardiola: 'No se han apostado muchos dólares a que remontaremos... ya lo veremos'
news-soccer.author: ALBERTO RUBIO
news-soccer.description: El técnico del Manchester City se muestra convencido de sus opciones de eliminar al Madrid.

news-basket.title: Shai hace historia y supera a Wilt Chamberlain
news-basket.author: ÁLVARO BLANCO
news-basket.description: El canadiense logra anotar 20 o más puntos en 127 partidos consecutivos, superando la marca histórica.

news-basket.title: Devoción por Adebayo en Miami: sus artículos se revalorizan
news-basket.author: EFE
news-basket.description: Los 83 puntos anotados ante los Wizards han hecho que la ciudad se vuelque con el jugador de los Heat.

news-basket.title: Luka Doncic's 51-point explosion leads Lakers
news-basket.author: marca.com
news-basket.description: Luka Doncic is at an impressive level as the postseason looming, leading the Lakers with a spectacular shooting display.

news-f1.title: La minipole no cambia la F1: Russell aplasta, Sainz y Alonso no salen del pozo
news-f1.author: EUGENIO MUÑOZ
news-f1.description: El británico firma la primera posición de la clasificación del sprint en China; Mercedes parece inalcanzable.

news-f1.title: Alonso: 'Estamos a tres décimas de Williams y en Australia eran ocho'
news-f1.author: MARCO CANSECO
news-f1.description: El asturiano valora positivamente haberse acercado a sus rivales inmediatos en el inicio de 2026.

news-f1.title: La cancelación de los GP de Bahréin y Arabia de F1 es inminente
news-f1.author: MARCO CANSECO
news-f1.description: La situación peligrosa por la guerra en Irán podría forzar la suspensión de las próximas carreras.

news-tenis.title: Alcaraz se viste de abeja en Indian Wells: 'Tuve que hacerlo por ellos'
news-tenis.author: ANDRÉS GARCÍA
news-tenis.description: El murciano aceptó el desafío de los aficionados tras el incidente del enjambre de 2024.

news-tenis.title: Sinner y su rendimiento en el calor de Indian Wells
news-tenis.author: ANDRÉS GARCÍA
news-tenis.description: El italiano eleva su racha de sets ganados consecutivamente tras arrollar a Tien bajo el sol de California.

news-tenis.title: La reconstrucción de Paula Badosa: 'Me acostumbré a tener mucho drama'
news-tenis.author: ENRIQUE CORBELLA
news-tenis.description: La tenista española muestra su lado más personal mientras intenta volver a la élite del tenis.

legal.title: Aviso Legal
legal.content:
El acceso y la navegación por esta página implica la aceptación de todas las condiciones legales aquí descritas.

Los contenidos de esta web, incluyendo textos, imágenes, logotipos, gráficos y software, están protegidos por derechos de propiedad intelectual.

Queda prohibida su reproducción, distribución, comunicación pública o transformación sin autorización expresa de Sportly S.L.

El uso de esta página debe ser adecuado y conforme a la ley, sin fines ilícitos o que puedan dañar la reputación de la empresa.

Sportly no se hace responsable de los daños o perjuicios derivados del uso indebido de la información contenida en esta web.

Cualquier enlace a sitios de terceros no implica respaldo ni responsabilidad por sus contenidos.

legal.title: Política de Privacidad
legal.content:
En Sportly. nos tomamos muy en serio la protección de tus datos personales. Recopilamos información únicamente con fines relacionados con la prestación de nuestros servicios y la mejora de la experiencia de usuario.

No compartimos tus datos con terceros sin tu consentimiento explícito, salvo obligaciones legales o administrativas que lo requieran.

Utilizamos medidas de seguridad técnicas y organizativas para proteger la información frente a accesos no autorizados, pérdida o manipulación de datos.

Tienes derecho a acceder, rectificar y eliminar tus datos personales, así como a retirar tu consentimiento cuando lo desees.

Los datos que nos facilites se conservarán solo durante el tiempo necesario para cumplir con los fines para los que fueron recopilados.

En caso de duda o consulta sobre el tratamiento de tus datos, puedes ponerte en contacto con nosotros a través de los medios disponibles en esta web.

El uso continuado de nuestros servicios implica la aceptación de esta política de privacidad.

legal.title: Política de Cookies
legal.content:
Esta web utiliza cookies para mejorar la experiencia de navegación y personalizar los contenidos mostrados. Las cookies nos permiten analizar el tráfico y funcionamiento del sitio.

Puedes aceptar o rechazar las cookies mediante las opciones que te proporciona tu navegador. También puedes configurarlas para que se eliminen automáticamente al cerrar la sesión.

No se recopilan datos personales mediante cookies sin tu consentimiento previo. Toda información recogida se utiliza únicamente con fines analíticos y de mejora del sitio.

Al continuar navegando, aceptas el uso de cookies según la presente política. Si decides no aceptar, algunas funcionalidades del sitio podrían no estar disponibles.

Las cookies de terceros pueden instalarse en nuestra web para fines publicitarios o de medición de audiencias. No tenemos control sobre estas cookies.

Para más información, consulta la sección de ayuda de tu navegador o contacta con nosotros para cualquier duda sobre nuestras cookies.

El uso de este sitio implica la aceptación de la política de cookies aquí descrita.

legal.title: Declaración de Accesibilidad
legal.content:
Sportly S.L. se compromete a garantizar que su sitio web sea accesible para todas las personas, incluidas aquellas con discapacidad.

Hemos implementado medidas de accesibilidad, siguiendo los estándares internacionales y las pautas WCAG 2.1 nivel AA, siempre que es técnicamente posible.

Se proporciona navegación clara, texto alternativo para imágenes, contraste suficiente, y compatibilidad con lectores de pantalla.

Algunas secciones pueden presentar limitaciones debido a contenido externo o a restricciones técnicas de ciertos navegadores.

Se revisa periódicamente la accesibilidad del sitio, con el objetivo de identificar y corregir posibles barreras de uso.

Si detectas dificultades para acceder a algún contenido o funcionalidad, puedes contactarnos y nos comprometemos a ofrecer una alternativa.

El compromiso con la accesibilidad forma parte de nuestra política de responsabilidad digital y mejora continua del sitio web.
